# KOFENOT‚ĄĘ

KOFENOT‚ĄĘ is a pocket-size laptop wedge that lifts a laptop at the hinge for spill deflection and improved posture. It is 1 oz, flat-folding, travel-ready, and uses no magnets or adhesives.

## Site Structure

- Home: consumer sales page for the $15 retail KOFENOT hanging pack.
- Wholesale: for coffee shops, coworking spaces, gift shops, and retailers that want to resell KOFENOT. Wholesale pricing uses placeholder $X tiers until exact prices are finalized.
- Custom: for businesses, events, conferences, coffee shops, coworking spaces, promotional product companies, and corporate gifts that want custom logo printing.

## Key Facts

- Product: pocket-size laptop wedge / laptop stand.
- Main use: lifts a laptop at the hinge for spill deflection and improved posture.
- Retail price: $15.
- Weight: 1 oz.
- Form: flat-folding and travel-ready.
- Attachment: no magnets and no adhesives.
- Compatibility: laptops, tablets, and phones.
- Branding: custom logo printing programs available on the Custom page.
- Business location: California-based.
- IP status: patent- and trademark-protected.

## Important URLs

- Homepage: https://kofenot.com/
- Wholesale: https://kofenot.com/wholesale
- Custom: https://kofenot.com/custom
- Spec sheet: https://kofenot.com/spec
- AI agent summary: https://kofenot.com/llms.txt
- Sitemap: https://kofenot.com/sitemap.xml
